routingSteps.label: Step 1
routingSteps.text: Choose the area that best matches your need.

routingSteps.label: Step 2
routingSteps.text: Email the department directly with your product type, timeline, and question.

routingSteps.label: Step 3
routingSteps.text: Call the main office for urgent coordination.

pathways.title: Analytical / Chemistry Inquiries
pathways.description: Use this route for chemistry testing questions, methods, quotes, and project scoping.

pathways.title: Microbiology Inquiries
pathways.description: Use this route for microbiology testing questions, sample context, and related documentation.

pathways.title: Product Development Support
pathways.description: Use this route for formulation, troubleshooting, development planning, and launch-readiness support.

pathways.title: Sample Submission / Courier Coordination
pathways.description: Use this route for sample logistics, pickups, receiving windows, and shipping coordination.

headquarters.responseNote: For faster routing, include your product type, sample matrix, timeline, and reporting need.

existingClients.title: Returning clients
existingClients.description: If you are following up on existing work, include a prior project name or sample ID when you contact the lab.
